Setlist
Venue Info
Media Gallery
Hersheypark Stadium (Hersheypark)
Hershey, PA
Seating Capacity: 30000
Venue Type : Stadium

Total Gigs: 16
  DMB  (15)
  Dave & Tim  (1)

Longest Performance:
09.11.03 - Seek Up (22:19)

Song Liberations
  7.9.10 – Still Water (after 1057 days)
Venue Picture
Description
HersheyPark Stadium is located just outside HersheyPark, a theme park on the outskirts of Hershey, PA. The stadium is shaped like an open-air college football stadium with no endzone seating.

Past DMB highlights include one of the best shows of the 2000 and 2003 Summer Tours, the latter containing an emotional Everyday that was released on the Central Park Bonus Disc. At the 2004 show, they performed what is considered a near unanimous pick for the best version of Good Good Time. Ironically, the version of Rhyme and Reason that directly precedes it was released on the Warehouse 8 Volume 2 fan club disc with the ending faded out right before Good Good Time segued out of it.

100 Hersheypark Dr.
Hershey, PA 17033

Songs that made their debut at this venue:
Can't Stop (6.23.06)
